'''âp-d-l-r''' ('''kapadleroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jabber|jabber]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-d-l-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jabber|jabber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-d-l-r
|-
! Lemma
| kapadleroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipadleroko|thipadleroko]] || [[word:jipadleroko|jipadleroko]] || [[word:shipadleroko|shipadleroko]] || [[word:kipadleroko|kipadleroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupadleroko|thuthupadleroko]] || [[word:jujupadleroko|jujupadleroko]] || [[word:shushupadleroko|shushupadleroko]] || [[word:kukupadleroko|kukupadleroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupadleroko|thupadleroko]] || [[word:jupadleroko|jupadleroko]] || [[word:shupadleroko|shupadleroko]] || [[word:kupadleroko|kupadleroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupadleroko|thupadleroko]] || [[word:jupadleroko|jupadleroko]] || [[word:shupadleroko|shupadleroko]] || [[word:kupadleroko|kupadleroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepadleroko|thepadleroko]] || [[word:jepadleroko|jepadleroko]] || [[word:shepadleroko|shepadleroko]] || [[word:kepadleroko|kepadleroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopadleroko|thothopadleroko]] || [[word:jojopadleroko|jojopadleroko]] || [[word:shoshopadleroko|shoshopadleroko]] || [[word:kokopadleroko|kokopadleroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopadleroko|thopadleroko]] || [[word:jopadleroko|jopadleroko]] || [[word:shopadleroko|shopadleroko]] || [[word:kopadleroko|kopadleroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopadleroko|thopadleroko]] || [[word:jopadleroko|jopadleroko]] || [[word:shopadleroko|shopadleroko]] || [[word:kopadleroko|kopadleroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpadleroko|thĂŠpadleroko]] || [[word:jĂŠpadleroko|jĂŠpadleroko]] || [[word:shĂŠpadleroko|shĂŠpadleroko]] || [[word:kĂŠpadleroko|kĂŠpadleroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapadleroko|thathapadleroko]] || [[word:jajapadleroko|jajapadleroko]] || [[word:shashapadleroko|shashapadleroko]] || [[word:kakapadleroko|kakapadleroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapadleroko|thapadleroko]] || [[word:japadleroko|japadleroko]] || [[word:shapadleroko|shapadleroko]] || [[word:kapadleroko|kapadleroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapadleroko|thapadleroko]] || [[word:japadleroko|japadleroko]] || [[word:shapadleroko|shapadleroko]] || [[word:kapadleroko|kapadleroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
